name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry new small calfskin exquisite quilted academic-style Loewe bag🤪🤪 Decorated with Thomas Burberry exclusive logo, paired with shiny chain strap. Can be worn on the shoulder, or use the top handle to create a clutch style. 19x5.5x11cm, 8391
